creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: romain
Date: Tue Jan 28 09:42:03 2014
New Revision: 341526
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/341526
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r341526/

Log:
  Update to 3.0.34 and frenshen port.
  
  Partially based on [1].
  
  PR:		ports/181361 [1]
  Submitted by:	Jack Pappas <jack.pappas@gmail.com> [1]

Deleted:
  head/lang/fsharp/files/
Modified:
  head/lang/fsharp/Makefile
  head/lang/fsharp/distinfo
  head/lang/fsharp/pkg-plist

Modified: head/lang/fsharp/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/lang/fsharp/Makefile	Tue Jan 28 09:38:08 2014	(r341525)
+++ head/lang/fsharp/Makefile	Tue Jan 28 09:42:03 2014	(r341526)
@@ -2,33 +2,23 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	fsharp
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.25
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.34
 CATEGORIES=	lang
-MASTER_SITES=	https://nodeload.github.com/fsharp/fsharp/tar.gz/ \
-		CRITICAL
-DISTFILES=	${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	mono@FreeBSD.org
 COMMENT=	Functional and object-oriented language for the .NET platform
+
 LICENSE=	APACHE20
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	mono>=3.0:${PORTSDIR}/lang/mono
 RUN_DEPENDS=	mono>=3.0:${PORTSDIR}/lang/mono
 
-USES=		pkgconfig
-USE_GMAKE=	yes
-USE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf
-
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME}-${PORTVERSION}
+USE_GITHUB=	yes
+GH_ACCOUNT=	${PORTNAME}
+GH_COMMIT=	b0c16bb
 
-# This is currently a workaround for the differences between pkg_* and pkg(8).
-.if defined(WITH_PKGNG)
-PLIST_SUB+=	LB="${LOCALBASE}/"
-.else
-PLIST_SUB+=	LB=""
-.endif
+USES=		gmake pkgconfig
+USE_AUTOTOOLS=	autoconf
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include "${.CURDIR}/../../lang/mono/bsd.mono.mk"
 .include <bsd.port.mk>
